debug_info.goal:
A : Finset ℕ
N : ℕ
hAN : A ⊆ range N
hA : ThreeAPFree ↑A
⊢ ∃ c > 0, ↑A.card ≤ ↑N / exp (-c * log ↑N ^ 12⁻¹)

failed_attempts:
by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  rw [div_eq_mul_inv, exp_neg, inv_inv, one_mul]
  refine (Nat.cast_le.2 (card_le_of_subset hAN)).trans ?_
  by_cases hN : N = 0
  · simp [hN]
  · apply le_mul_of_one_le_right (Nat.cast_nonneg _)
    exact one_le_exp (rpow_nonneg (log_nonneg (Nat.one_le_cast.2 (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hN))) _)

by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  simp only [neg_mul, one_mul, Real.exp_neg, inv_inv, div_eq_mul_inv]
  norm_cast
  refine (card_le_of_subset hAN).trans <| le_mul_of_one_le_right (Nat.cast_nonneg _) <| one_le_exp ?_
  rcases N.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hN
  · simp; norm_num
  · apply rpow_nonneg; apply log_nonneg; exact_mod_cast hN

    · exact log_nonneg (Nat.one_le_cast.2 (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h))
